entities_and_meanings.meaning: Primary scheme/building represented by the worksheet.
Unit-level meter labels. Prefix VG appears to abbreviate the building or scheme name and is followed by the unit number.
Bulk supply meter identifiers used for building-level supply or aggregation.
Meters associated with shared infrastructure, common property, or service areas rather than private units.

notes: Cross-reference is based on retained file/folder names only; OCR/text extraction was not performed for PDFs or images.
